scripts.build:sdk: dotnet publish ../NodeSDK -r linux-x64 -c Release && cp ../NodeSDK/bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/XvirusNodeSDK.node sdk/ && cp ../NodeSDK/bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/XvirusNodeSDK.mjs sdk/ && cp ../NodeSDK/bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/import.cjs sdk/ && cp ../NodeSDK/bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/*.so sdk/
